'''Nalan''' was an [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing girl. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] she was to be taken to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] but was involved in the elaborate scheme by [[Ghitsa Dogder]] and [[Fenig Nabon]] to scam [[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

With her fellow slaves she was transferred through [[Clan Shak]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and taken aboard ''[[The Fury]]''. When the ship's [[Shada D'ukal|pilot]] discovered the Twi'leks were not traveling voluntarily, Dodger and Nabon were sent to Nal Hutta alone by [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].

After this, Nalan presented D'ukal with a [[holo tube]] requesting them to be taken back to Ryloth and placed under the care of the [[Dira Clan]].
